name: German Chocolate Carmamel Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 package (175 g) German Chocolate cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the caramels in a double boiler or microwave. Stir in 1/3 cup of milk and set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the cake mix with the melted butter and remaining milk. Set half aside and press the other half into a greased 13in x 9in x 2in baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
4. Pour the caramel mixture over the top, then spoon the reserved cake mixture on top.
5. Return to the oven for 20 minutes.
